subject: feat(state): default to 'clean' look preset on load
body:
Set activeStylePreset to 'clean' instead of null so new users see a
polished starting state. Clean is the most neutral look (Inter/Inter,
minimal overlay) — switching to other looks feels like exploring
options rather than "turning on a feature."

Also aligned default fonts from montserrat/inter to inter/inter to
match the Clean look's font pairing.

Tags: state, ux, defaults
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: wordpress-design-tokens
Semver: minor
